impact: This advances the PP&D plan by creating a deterministic, privacy-preserving user-case-state fixture that can drive missing-information and DevHub draft planning without storing private documents, account identifiers, cookies, traces, screenshots, payments, or live DevHub state.
summary: Add a fixture-only redacted user-case-state contract with validation for mocked project facts, missing-information questions, uploaded-file placeholders, draft status, and source evidence.
target_task: Task checkbox-107: Task checkbox-102: Add a fixture-only redacted user-case-state contract that links a mocked project fact inventory, missing-information questions, uploaded-file placeholders, draft status, and source evidence without storing private documents, account identifiers, cookies, traces, screenshots, payments, or live DevHub state.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
